problem: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient
mechanism: Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis
hypothesis: The key to What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient is Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis — specifically Vagus nerve stimulation — which would help 280,000,000 people affected.
